# Primus Physio

> Primus Physio is a specialist musculoskeletal (MSK) physiotherapy clinic in Newcastle-under-Lyme, Staffordshire, serving Newcastle-under-Lyme and Stoke-on-Trent. Led by Luqman Mazhar, an HCPC & CSP registered physiotherapist and former Head Academy Physiotherapist at Port Vale FC. Same-week appointments available, evenings and weekends, no GP referral needed. Recognised by AXA Health, Bupa, WPA, Aviva and Vitality Health.

## Practice Information

- Address: Copthall House, King Street, Newcastle-under-Lyme, ST5 1EL
- Phone: 07867 782786
- Email: info@primusphysio.co.uk
- Clinician: Luqman Mazhar, HCPC & CSP registered physiotherapist
- Hours: Evenings and weekends available; same-week appointments
- Pricing: Initial assessment £60 (60 minutes); follow-up sessions £40 (30 minutes); sports massage from £35
- Insurers accepted: AXA Health, Bupa, WPA, Aviva, Vitality Health
- Booking: https://primus-physio.uk3.cliniko.com/bookings

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/): Overview of Primus Physio, services and booking
- [About](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/about.html): Luqman Mazhar's background — NHS, GP First Contact Practice, Port Vale FC
- [Services & Prices](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/services.html): Full list of treatments and pricing
- [FAQ](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/faq.html): Common questions on referrals, insurance, appointments
- [Contact & Directions](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/contact.html): Location, parking, contact details
- [Testimonials](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/testimonials.html): Patient reviews (5.0 stars, Google)
- [Physio in Stoke-on-Trent](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/stoke-on-trent-physio.html): Serving Stoke-on-Trent patients

## Conditions Treated

- [Back Pain](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/back-pain-physio.html)
- [Sciatica](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/sciatica-treatment.html)
- [Neck Pain](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/neck-pain-physio.html)
- [Shoulder Pain](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/shoulder-pain-physio.html)
- [Knee Pain](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/knee-pain-physio.html)
- [Hip Pain](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/hip-pain-physio.html)
- [Ankle Pain](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/ankle-pain-physio.html)
- [Plantar Fasciitis](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/plantar-fasciitis-treatment.html)
- [Running Injuries](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/running-injury-physio.html)
- [Sports Injuries](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/sports-injury-physio.html)
- [Tennis & Golfer's Elbow](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/tennis-elbow-treatment.html)
- [Carpal Tunnel](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/carpal-tunnel-treatment.html)
- [Post-Surgery Rehab](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/post-op-rehab.html)

## Treatments

- [Sports Massage](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/sports-massage-newcastle-under-lyme.html): From £35, no referral needed
- [Cupping & Hijama](https://www.primusphysio.co.uk/cupping-therapy-newcastle-under-lyme.html)
